topics.title: Artie Lange's Talk Show Appearance
topics.summary: The studio reviews Artie Lange's recent appearance on the Jimmy Kimmel show, discussing his comedic performance, personal anecdotes about celebrity interactions, and his upcoming tour.

topics.title: Media Appearances and American Idol Voting
topics.summary: The studio discusses recent media appearances by Artie Lange and Chris Rock, the challenges of film production, and a humorous debate regarding the "Vote for Sanjaya" movement on American Idol.

topics.title: American Idol and Sanjaya Malachar Controversy
topics.summary: The show features a discussion regarding the controversy surrounding contestant Sanjaya Malachar on American Idol, specifically focusing on Howard Stern's influence and the public reaction to his continued presence in the competition.

topics.title: Governor Interview and Musical Discussion
topics.summary: The studio features a conversation with a governor regarding American Idol, followed by a discussion on the lyrics of 'Your Move' and various classic rock tracks.

topics.title: Celebrity Racing and Film Discussions
topics.summary: The studio discusses a recent celebrity racing event in California involving George Lucas, various actresses, and the performance of actors in recent action films.

topics.title: Weight Loss Contest Weigh-Ins
topics.summary: The studio records a segment where participants are weighed for a weight loss competition, resulting in various rankings and commentary on their progress.

topics.title: Promotional Conflicts and Media Blunders
topics.summary: The studio explores a canceled promotional event caused by corporate disputes, discusses various segments of Howard TV, and reacts to a news reporter's accidental use of profanity on air.

topics.title: Lexi Bardot Interview and Shrinktionary Game
topics.summary: The studio hosts a segment featuring porn star Lexi Bardot as she discusses her career, personal life, and upcoming film before introducing two contestants for the Shrinktionary competition.

topics.title: Ass-Drawing Contest and Guest Performance
topics.summary: The studio hosts a competition where contestants attempt to draw objects with their buttocks to win a date, followed by a guest performance involving a vibrator.

topics.title: Artie Lange's Struggle with Addiction
topics.summary: The show features Artie Lange discussing his past heroin addiction, the difficulties of obtaining drugs on the road, and his experiences working alongside Bob Levy during high-pressure comedy tours.

topics.title: Drug Addiction and Career Struggles
topics.summary: The studio features a candid discussion regarding the personal struggles with substance abuse, the realities of life on the road as a performer, and the professional dynamics between the show's cast members.

topics.title: Staff Loyalty and Media News
topics.summary: The studio discusses internal staff transitions, a lost film copy of Black Snake Moan, various listener interactions regarding personal life choices, and upcoming news segments.

topics.title: Relationship Dynamics and Celebrity News
topics.summary: The studio discusses personal relationship dynamics regarding children and marriage, followed by a segment on celebrity news including the death of Anna Nicole Smith and upcoming musical acts.

topics.title: Pop Culture and Current Events
topics.summary: The studio discusses a variety of topics including music trends, celebrity news regarding Simon Cowell and Anna Nicole Smith, reports on diving accidents, and upcoming reality television shows.

topics.title: Legal Issues and Entertainment News
topics.summary: The show covers Naomi Campbell’s legal situation regarding her treatment of staff, a live interaction with a porn star named Lexi, the upcoming Phil Spector trial, box office reports for recent films, and Heather Mills' appearance on Dancing with the Stars.
